title: human-resource-management
description: A human resource management system built with Next.js, featuring employee management, attendance tracking, and performance evaluation functionalities.

title: QuanLyDesignerCTLD
description: My first actual project, which I built for my company to manage clothing templates. It allows users to create, edit, and organize clothing templates with a user-friendly interface.

title: QuanLySellerCTLD
description: As team leader with four fresher developers, I built this project to help the company manage its money flow. It allows users to track and manage financial transactions, generate reports, and gain insights into the company's financial health.

title: Hilu Learn
description: Prototype of blockchain e-learning platform featuring course management, quizzes, XP/leveling system, project collaboration, and real-time leaderboards. Built with Next.js 15 and Supabase.

title: levents_shop
description: A full-stack e-commerce application built with MongoDB, Express.js, React.js, and Node.js featuring comprehensive admin functionality and order management.

title: elsa-speak-clone
description: A comprehensive Android application designed to help users learn English through interactive lessons, pronunciation practice, quizzes, and more.

title: barbie-thrift-tool
description: A responsive tool for documenting apparel details with dynamic output generation.

title: BoysCoffee
description: A web application for browsing, selecting, and ordering beverages from anywhere.
